title: How to Do SEO for YouTube Shorts
description:
Shorts SEO works differently than long-form — here's what actually matters.

Most people watching your Shorts aren't searching for them. They're scrolling, and your video appears. That means your title isn't about ranking in search — it's about stopping the scroll. Use a curiosity gap: give viewers just enough to make them want to keep watching.

Descriptions? You can skip them. YouTube analyzes everything said and shown in your video to understand what it's about.

What does matter is hashtags. After you upload, YouTube suggests high-traffic hashtags based on your content. Pick a few, add them, and your Short gets connected to other videos on the same topic — helping YouTube show it to the right people.

Title. Hashtags. Post. That's your Shorts SEO.

🔔 Subscribe for more YouTube tips.
#youtubeshorts  #youtubeseo  #shortstips  #growyourchannel  #youtubetips
